nodes.title: Combat frame budget
nodes.description: Given N characters and hazards in combat, when TurnManager and characters Update run, then frame time stays under a defined budget on target hardware (manual or CI profile).

nodes.title: No GC on TurnManager hot path
nodes.description: Given combat in RealTimeWindow or counter window, when Update runs for several frames, then managed heap does not allocate per frame on TurnManager hot paths (Profiler verification).
